text:
Its a bit frustrating, because Gemini 3.1 Pro is an excellent model and can deliver really good results.

But here is GPT-5.5 Pro for comparison. Sadly, it took this assignment very seriously and ethically and thus was no fun at all. https://t.co/o3N2jQwraE

Here's your reminder you can use Gemini CLI in Codex...

Might be useful when they release a new model. https://t.co/Zv0ngUVcDG

RT @theworldlabs: Expand is now available to everyone! 

Extend your world in any direction you choose: around corners, into rooms, and bey…

OpenAI 上周发布 GPT-5.5 后，紧接着放出了一份官方提示词指南。这份指南传递的核心信息只有一个：别再写长提示词了。

GPT-5.5 距离上一代 GPT-5.4 只隔了六周，API 定价每百万输入 Token 5 美元、输出 30 美元，上下文窗口 100 万 Token，目前已面向 Plus、Pro、Business 和 Enterprise https://t.co/QiruNVS7mI
